field.label: Seccion
field.expression: select seccion_id from HTXUSERS where HTXUSERS.Id_usuario = '[__usuario__]'

field.label: Sección.Premio
field.expression: select idMomento from SECCION INNER JOIN HTXUSERS ON id_seccion = seccion_id where HTXUSERS.Id_usuario = '[__usuario__]'

field.label: Seccion.Calidad
field.expression: select idMomentoCalidad from SECCION INNER JOIN HTXUSERS ON id_seccion = seccion_id where HTXUSERS.Id_usuario = '[__usuario__]'

field.label: Ult.Act
field.valor: date("d/m g:i", mktime(date("g"), date("i"), date("s"), date("m"), date("d"), date("Y")))

field.expression: select group_concat(concat(TUR.fechaing, ' - ',C.desabv) SEPARATOR "\n") FROM TURNOSPRODUCCION as TUR join PEDCOTIZ as P on TUR.nrofab = P.nrocha join HOMOLOGMOD H on P.homologacion_id = H.id_homologacion join CARROCERIA C on C.nrocar = H.nrocar where TUR.fechaing >= str_to_date('[__desdefecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and TUR.fechaing <= str_to_date('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and TUR.linea_id = 1

field.label: Turnos
field.expression: select SUM(C.porcentaje_sobrea365) FROM TURNOSPRODUCCION as TUR join PEDCOTIZ as P on TUR.nrofab = P.nrocha join HOMOLOGMOD H on P.homologacion_id = H.id_homologacion join CARROCERIA C on C.nrocar = H.nrocar where TUR.fechaing >= str_to_date('[__desdefecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and TUR.fechaing <= str_to_date('[__hastafecha__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and TUR.linea_id = 1

field.label: Liberado
field.expression: (select SUM(porcentaje_sobrea365) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join PEDCOTIZ on nrofab_id = nrocha join HOMOLOGMOD H on homologacion_id = id_homologacion join CARROCERIA C on C.nrocar = H.nrocar where fecha_control >= '[__desdefecha__]' and fecha_control <= '[__hastafecha__]' and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id = '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id != 6)

field.label: %Obj.Men.Yurnos
field.expression:
select (case when '[__cant_unidades_periodo__]' >= '[__cant_turnos_periodo__]' then 'background-color:greenyellow;font-weight:bold;font-size:80px'
when '[__cant_unidades_periodo__]' >= (('[__cant_turnos_periodo__]' + 0) - 3) and '[__cant_unidades_periodo__]' < '[__cant_turnos_periodo__]' then 'background-color:#FFFC00;font-weight:bold;font-size:80px'
when '[__cant_unidades_periodo__]' < (('[__cant_turnos_periodo__]' + 0) - 3) then 'background-color:red;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:80px'
end)

field.label: Cant.Cntrl
field.expression: select case when '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' = 6 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= '[__desdefecha__]' and fecha_control <= '[__hastafecha__]' and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 6 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 15 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 0 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 25 and no_aplica = 0 )/6 when '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' != 0 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= '[__desdefecha__]' and fecha_control <= '[__hastafecha__]' and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id = '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' and no_aplica = 0) end

field.label: Cant.Cntrl.Obs
field.expression: select case when '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' = 6 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= '[__desdefecha__]' and fecha_control <= '[__hastafecha__]' and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 6 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 15 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 0 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 25 and no_conforme = 1 and (controlcausal_id = 2 or controlcausal_id = 3))/6 when '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' != 0 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= '[__desdefecha__]' and fecha_control <= '[__hastafecha__]' and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id = '[__idMomentoCalidad__]' and no_conforme = 1 and (controlcausal_id = 2 or controlcausal_id = 3)) end

field.label: %Obj.Men
field.expression: select option_value FROM HTXOPTIONS where option_description = 'Objetivo grafico % Defectos por Mes'

field.label: %Obj.Men.Obser
field.expression:
select (case when ('[__porcentaje_obser__]' * 1) < 2 then 'background-color:greenyellow;'
when ('[__porcentaje_obser__]' * 1) >= 2 and ('[__porcentaje_obser__]' * 1) <= ('[__objetivo_mensual__]' * 1) then 'background-color:#FFFC00;font-weight:bold;font-size:80px'
when ('[__porcentaje_obser__]' * 1) > ('[__objetivo_mensual__]' * 1) then 'background-color:red;color:white;font-weight:bold;font-size:80px'
end)

field.label: Trabaj.
field.expression:
select
(concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0')) + 0) from (select F1.fecha,
@egr:= (SELECT H.egreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing:= (SELECT H.ingreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
@h1:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 0, 1) as "h1", @h2:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 1, 1) as "h2", @h3:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 2, 1) as "h3", @h4:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 3, 1) as "h4",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h2 > @egr then @egr else @h2 end , case when @h1 < @ing then @ing else @h1 end )), 0) + ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h4 > @egr then @egr else @h4 end , case when @h4 < @ing then @ing else @h3 end )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join PERSONAL on PERSONAL.id_seccion = '[__seccion_id__]' and PERSONAL.fechaEgreso = '0000-00-00'
left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= '[__desdefecha__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hastafechaayer__]' and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF

select count(*)*9 from FRANCOS_PER F join PERSONAL P on F.IdPersona = P.IdPersona and P.fechaEgreso = "0000-00-00" join CALENDAR ON CALENDAR.fecha >= F.fechainicio and CALENDAR.fecha <= (case when F.fechafin = '0000-00-00' then '[__hastafecha__]' else F.fechafin end) join FRANCOS_CAT FC on FC.idfranco = F.idfranco and FC.tipo = F.tipo where P.id_seccion = '[__id_seccion__]' and FC.descuenta_grupo = 1 and CALENDAR.fecha >= '[__desdefecha__]' and CALENDAR.fecha <= '[__hastafecha__]' and dayofweek(CALENDAR.fecha) NOT IN (1,7) and CALENDAR.fecha NOT IN (select idFeriado from FERIADOS)
field.label: No.Imp
Horas
field.expression:
select (concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0')) + 0) from
(select F1.fecha,
@egr2:= (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing2:= (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( @egr2 , @ing2 )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 join PERSONAL P on id_seccion = '[__seccion_id__]' and P.fechaEgreso = "0000-00-00" left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= (select (case when fechaDesde < '[__desdefecha__]' then '[__desdefecha__]' else fechaDesde end) from SECCIONHISTORIA where fechaDesde <= '[__hastafechaayer__]' and SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = P.IdPersona order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and F1.fecha <= (select (case when fechaEgreso = '0000-00-00' then '[__hastafechaayer__]' else fechaEgreso end) from PERSONAL where PERSONAL.IdPersona = P.IdPersona) and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF

field.label: %Obj.Men
field.expression: select (option_value + 0) FROM HTXOPTIONS where option_description = 'Objetivo grafico Cantidad de Inasistencias x Mes' limit 1

field.label: %Obj.Men.Obser
field.expression:
select (case when ('[__porcentaje_ausentismo__]' * 1) < 3 then 'background-color:greenyellow;'
when ('[__porcentaje_ausentismo__]' * 1) >= 3 and ('[__porcentaje_ausentismo__]' * 1) <= ('[__objetivo_mensual_ausentismo__]' * 1) then 'background-color:#FFFC00;'
when ('[__porcentaje_ausentismo__]' * 1) > ('[__objetivo_mensual_ausentismo__]' * 1) then 'background-color:red;color:white;'
end)
